name: demo-game
description: Opsia와 연동하는 GPL-3.0 라이브 데모 게임

scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:ops-web
scripts.build:survev: pnpm --dir upstream-survev --filter @survev/server build && pnpm --dir upstream-survev --filter @survev/client build
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && npm run typecheck:ops-web && pnpm --dir upstream-survev --filter @survev/server typecheck
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run build:survev && node scripts/run-tests.mjs dist/tests && npm run test:survev
scripts.test:unit: npm run build && node scripts/run-tests.mjs dist/tests/unit
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && node scripts/run-tests.mjs dist/tests/e2e
scripts.start:game: cd upstream-survev/server && OPSIA_ROOM=true OPSIA_INFINITE=true SURVEV_CLIENT_DIR=$PWD/../client/dist node --enable-source-maps dist/gameServer.js
